message:
fix(supply_chain): bound version history/audit_history, use canonical ct_eq in trust_card

- cards_by_extension version history grew unbounded on each create/update;
  now capped at MAX_CARD_VERSIONS (512) via push_bounded
- audit_history accumulated across version clones without bound; now capped
  at MAX_AUDIT_HISTORY (256) via push_bounded
- Replaced local constant_time_eq with crate::security::constant_time::ct_eq
  for hash/signature comparisons (consistent with project conventions)

All 17 trust_card tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
